codeSystems.description: All Barbiturate medications

codeSystems.title: Barbiturate urine drug screening tests
codeSystems.description: Presumed general urine tests for barbiturates that are not specific to a particular substance.

codeSystems.description: All benzodiazepine clinical drugs

codeSystems.name: BENZODIAZEPINE_URINE_DRUG_SCREENING_TESTS
codeSystems.title: Benzodiazepine urine drug screening tests
codeSystems.description: Presumed general urine tests for benzodiazepines that are not specific to a particular substance.

codeSystems.description: All Buprenorphine and Methadone medications

codeSystems.description: All Buprenorphine medications

codeSystems.name: BUPRENORPHINE_URINE_DRUG_SCREENING_TESTS
codeSystems.title: Buprenorphine urine drug screening tests

codeSystems.description: All neoplastic and malignant conditions, including pain due to neoplasm.

codeSystems.name: CNS_DEPRESSANT_MEDICATIONS

codeSystems.name: COCAINE_URINE_DRUG_SCREENING_TESTS
codeSystems.title: Cocaine urine drug screening tests
codeSystems.description: Urine tests for cocaine and cocaine metabolites

codeSystems.name: CONDITION_CLINICAL_STATUS_ACTIVE
codeSystems.title: Condition Clinical Status Active
codeSystems.description: The subject is currently experiencing the condition or situation, there is evidence of the condition or situation, or considered to be a significant risk.

codeSystems.name: ENCOUNTER_DIAGNOSIS_CONDITION_CATEGORY
codeSystems.title: Encounter Diagnosis Condition Category
codeSystems.description: Encounter Diagnosis condition category.

codeSystems.name: PROBLEM_LIST_CONDITION_CATEGORY
codeSystems.title: Problem List Condition Category
codeSystems.description: Problem list condition category.

codeSystems.name: US_CORE_HEALTH_CONCERN_CONDITION_CATEGORY
codeSystems.title: US Core Health Concern Condition Category
codeSystems.description: US Core Health Concern Condition Category.

codeSystems.name: SLEEP_DISORDERED_BREATHING
codeSystems.title: Sleep disordered breathing
codeSystems.description: Conditions associated with sleep-related breathing disorders.

codeSystems.name: CONDITIONS_DOCUMENTING_SUBSTANCE_ABUSE
codeSystems.title: Conditions documenting substance misuse
codeSystems.description: Any finding or condition that indicate problematic misuse of a substance other than tobacco or laxatives, including "history of" conditions.

codeSystems.name: CONDITIONS_LIKELY_TERMINAL_FOR_OPIOID_PRESCRIBING
codeSystems.title: Conditions likely terminal for opioid prescribing
codeSystems.description: Conditions that generally are thought to have terminal prognosis

codeSystems.name: EXTENDED_RELEASE_OPIOID_WITH_AMBULATORY_MISUSE_POTENTIAL
codeSystems.title: Extended release opioid with ambulatory misuse potential
codeSystems.description: All opioid clinical drugs except those restricted to surgical use only, and that are in an extended release dose form code

codeSystems.name: FENTANYL_TYPE_MEDICATIONS

codeSystems.title: Fentanyl-type urine drug screening tests
codeSystems.description: Urine tests for fentanyl-type drugs and metabolites

codeSystems.name: GENERAL_OPIATE_URINE_DRUG_SCREENING_TESTS
codeSystems.title: General opiate urine drug screening tests
codeSystems.description: Presumed general urine tests for naturally occurring opioids (i.e. opiates) that are not specific to a particular substance based upon the inclusion of the word 'opiates' in the long name.

codeSystems.name: HEROIN_URINE_DRUG_SCREENING_TESTS
codeSystems.title: Heroin urine drug screening tests
codeSystems.description: Presumed general urine tests for heroin and metabolites.

codeSystems.name: HOSPICE_DISPOSITION

codeSystems.description: Finding codes for receiving hospice care

codeSystems.description: Procedure codes for referral, admission, or transfer to a hospice

codeSystems.name: LIMITED_LIFE_EXPECTANCY_CONDITIONS
codeSystems.title: Limited life expectancy conditions
codeSystems.description: A finding that documents a terminal prognosis

codeSystems.name: Valueset_medicationrequest_category_community
codeSystems.title: ValueSet - Medication Request Category Community
codeSystems.description: Includes requests for medications to be administered or consumed by the patient in their home (this would include long term care or nursing homes, hospices, etc.).

codeSystems.name: Valueset_medicationrequest_status_active
codeSystems.title: ValueSet - Medication Request Status Active
codeSystems.description: The prescription is 'actionable', but not all actions that are implied by it have occurred yet.

codeSystems.description: All naloxone medications

codeSystems.name: NON_OPIOID_URINE_DRUG_SCREENING
codeSystems.title: Non-opioid drug urine screening

codeSystems.description: Urine tests for naturally occurring opioids (i.e. opiates) that are specific to a particular naturally occurring opioid and therefore do not have the general word 'opiates' in the long name.

codeSystems.title: Opioid treatment assessment procedure

codeSystems.description: All Oxycodone medications

codeSystems.title: Oxycodone urine drug screening tests
codeSystems.description: Presumed general urine tests for oxycodone.

codeSystems.description: Therapeutic activities indicating end of life. Include procedures or therapies specific to a terminal patient, exclude procedures or therapies performed on a deceased patient
